item.title: The Pentagon's UAP Release Paradox: 162 Files, Zero Search Function
item.description: The Pentagon released 162 declassified UAP documents without indexing or metadata. An analysis of this rollout reveals a pattern of controlled disclosure that limits public access to unexplained phenomena data.
item.content:encoded: The Pentagon released 162 declassified UAP documents without indexing or metadata. An analysis of this rollout reveals a pattern of controlled disclosure that limits public access to unexplained phenomena data.
item.dc:creator: Casey North

item.title: "The World Is Losing Trust": Foreign Investment In Germany Plunges To Lowest Level Since 2009
item.description:
"The World Is Losing Trust": Foreign Investment In Germany Plunges To Lowest Level Since 2009

An analysis by the auditing and consulting firm EY, reported by the said 245,500 industrial jobs had been lost in Germany since 2019, before the coronavirus crisis.

Volkswagen has become one of the clearest examples of the problems facing German
item.content:encoded:
"The World Is Losing Trust": Foreign Investment In Germany Plunges To Lowest Level Since 2009

An analysis by the auditing and consulting firm EY, reported by the said 245,500 industrial jobs had been lost in Germany since 2019, before the coronavirus crisis.

Volkswagen has become one of the clearest examples of the problems facing German
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Zcash hits near 7 year high against Bitcoin.
item.description:
Zcash is probs the only mature coin to hit a many year high against BTC. Is this a case of the limits of Bitcoin, or a theme of privacy emerging in crypto.

submitted by
item.content:encoded:
Zcash is probs the only mature coin to hit a many year high against BTC. Is this a case of the limits of Bitcoin, or a theme of privacy emerging in crypto.

item.title: WW2 N@ZI secret bunker factory ST. Georgen MT
item.description: I did extensive digging into the 3rd Reich which led down a very dark rabbit hole I posted a video about this facility but never turned it into a technical document. I believe the victims of this camp should be remembered because for what ever reason this camp is hidden in plain sight but considering Himmler basically spent a lot of tim
item.content:encoded: I did extensive digging into the 3rd Reich which led down a very dark rabbit hole I posted a video about this facility but never turned it into a technical document. I believe the victims of this camp should be remembered because for what ever reason this camp is hidden in plain sight but considering Himmler basically spent a lot of tim
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: $150 Humanoid Robot House Cleaning Service Threatens To Undercut Maid Services
item.description:
$150 Humanoid Robot House Cleaning Service Threatens To Undercut Maid Services

It's no secret that some humanoid robotics companies are training their machines for work on factory floors, while others are positioning their bots to enter homes in the coming years.

One of the first real signs of humanoids entering homes today is a new cleaning service in San Francisco that uses what appear to be Unitree humanoid robots trained to clean everything from floors and count
item.content:encoded:
$150 Humanoid Robot House Cleaning Service Threatens To Undercut Maid Services

It's no secret that some humanoid robotics companies are training their machines for work on factory floors, while others are positioning their bots to enter homes in the coming years.

One of the first real signs of humanoids entering homes today is a new cleaning service in San Francisco that uses what appear to be Unitree humanoid robots trained to clean everything from floors and count
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Daily Crypto Discussion - May 24, 2026 (GMT+0)
item.description:
Welcome to the Daily Crypto Discussion thread. Please read the disclaimer and rules before participating.

Disclaimer:

Consider all information posted here with several liberal heaps of salt, and always cross check any information you may read on this thread with known sources. Any trade information posted in this open thread may be
item.content:encoded:
Welcome to the Daily Crypto Discussion thread. Please read the disclaimer and rules before participating.

Disclaimer:

Consider all information posted here with several liberal heaps of salt, and always cross check any information you may read on this thread with known sources. Any trade information posted in this open thread may be
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: A Hidden Pattern in Famous Abstract Art Reveals a Secret Mathematical “Golden Rule” Linked to Human Perception
item.description: A Hidden Pattern in Famous Abstract Art Reveals a Secret Mathematical “Golden Rule” Linked to Human Perception
item.dc:creator: Casey North

item.title: SpaceX IPO sell off ?
item.description:
$SPCX filed its S-1 on May 20, targets a Nasdaq listing June 12 at a $1.75T valuation. Index providers literally rewrote their rules to fast-track it in.

How big ETFs gonna include $SPCX in their holding?

  1. will they proportionally sell of holdings and we will be fucked ?
  2. or the last name in SPY (500/500) / QQ
item.content:encoded:
$SPCX filed its S-1 on May 20, targets a Nasdaq listing June 12 at a $1.75T valuation. Index providers literally rewrote their rules to fast-track it in.

How big ETFs gonna include $SPCX in their holding?

  1. will they proportionally sell of holdings and we will be fucked ?
  2. or the last name in SPY (500/500) / QQ
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Feds Subpoena Hasan Piker, CodePink Cofounder Over "Humanitarian" Trip To Communist Cuba
item.description:
Feds Subpoena Hasan Piker, CodePink Cofounder Over "Humanitarian" Trip To Communist Cuba

Federal officials have issued "Requests for Information" via Treasury Department subpoenas to Turkish-American millionaire and far-left Twitch streamer Hasan Piker and pro-China CodePink cofounder Susan Medea Benjamin as part of a broader probe into whether the activists violated sanctions laws during a "humanitarian" trip to communist-run Cuba, according to a new
item.content:encoded:
Feds Subpoena Hasan Piker, CodePink Cofounder Over "Humanitarian" Trip To Communist Cuba

Federal officials have issued "Requests for Information" via Treasury Department subpoenas to Turkish-American millionaire and far-left Twitch streamer Hasan Piker and pro-China CodePink cofounder Susan Medea Benjamin as part of a broader probe into whether the activists violated sanctions laws during a "humanitarian" trip to communist-run Cuba, according to a new
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Suicide Bomb Attack On Train In Pakistan Kills At Least 30, Over 100 Wounded
item.description:
Suicide Bomb Attack On Train In Pakistan Kills At Least 30, Over 100 Wounded

A massive suicide car bomb attack blew up and derailed a train transporting security personnel in Quetta, the provincial capital of Balochistan.

The blast ripped through the train passenger cars, killing at least 30 people and leaving more than 100 others wounded, with the casualty count
item.content:encoded:
Suicide Bomb Attack On Train In Pakistan Kills At Least 30, Over 100 Wounded

A massive suicide car bomb attack blew up and derailed a train transporting security personnel in Quetta, the provincial capital of Balochistan.

The blast ripped through the train passenger cars, killing at least 30 people and leaving more than 100 others wounded, with the casualty count
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: German Taxpayers Bled Dry: Mass Migration Cost €40 Billion In 2025
item.description:
German Taxpayers Bled Dry: Mass Migration Cost €40 Billion In 2025

The €24.8 billion is strictly the federal bill. The actual, combined national cost of migration for Germany is that €24.8 billion plus the massive, separate billions that the individual states and municipalities had to pull from their own local tax revenues to cover their own deficits brought on by mass
item.content:encoded:
German Taxpayers Bled Dry: Mass Migration Cost €40 Billion In 2025

The €24.8 billion is strictly the federal bill. The actual, combined national cost of migration for Germany is that €24.8 billion plus the massive, separate billions that the individual states and municipalities had to pull from their own local tax revenues to cover their own deficits brought on by mass
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Pentagon's Declassified UFO Archive Deliberately Obscured: A Pattern of Controlled Transparency
item.description: The Pentagon released 162 declassified UAP files on May 8, but provided no search function, metadata, or filtering—raising questions about whether disclosure means accessibility.
item.content:encoded: The Pentagon released 162 declassified UAP files on May 8, but provided no search function, metadata, or filtering—raising questions about whether disclosure means accessibility.
item.dc:creator: Casey North

item.title: Help EFF Solve an Issue That's Bigger than Creepy Ads
item.description: Millions of people around the world use EFF's Privacy Badger. This browser extension blocks the hidden trackers that twist your web browsing into a commodity for Big Tech, advertisers, scammers, and data brokers. But did you know that we’re trying to solve an issue that’s even bigger than creepy ads and user profiling? and weak privacy laws allow data brokers to harvest your data and
item.content:encoded: Millions of people around the world use EFF's Privacy Badger. This browser extension blocks the hidden trackers that twist your web browsing into a commodity for Big Tech, advertisers, scammers, and data brokers. But did you know that we’re trying to solve an issue that’s even bigger than creepy ads and user profiling? and weak privacy laws allow data brokers to harvest your data and
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: [Federal Register] Request Notice: Use of Foreign-Built Small Passenger Vessel in United States Coastwise Trade, S/V SONG OF DAVID
item.description: The Secretary of Transportation, as represented by MARAD, is authorized to make determinations regarding the coastwise use of foreign built; certain U.S. built; and U.S. and foreign rebuilt vessels that solely carry no more than twelve passengers for hire. MARAD has received such a determination request and is publishing this notice to solicit comments to assist with determining whether the proposed use of the vessel set forth in the request would have an adverse effect on U.S. vessel builders o
item.content:encoded: The Secretary of Transportation, as represented by MARAD, is authorized to make determinations regarding the coastwise use of foreign built; certain U.S. built; and U.S. and foreign rebuilt vessels that solely carry no more than twelve passengers for hire. MARAD has received such a determination request and is publishing this notice to solicit comments to assist with determining whether the proposed use of the vessel set forth in the request would have an adverse effect on U.S. vessel builders o
item.dc:creator: Jordan Calloway

item.title: Any non privacy destroying ways to view IMDB reviews?
item.description:
The site has just recently started requiring an account just to view reviews!

I surely don't want to sign in with my google account or amazon account or any other and have my viewing history tracked in that way. Not a chance, gosh no!

I've been trying some tricks I know that people use to get around paywalled stuff
item.content:encoded:
The site has just recently started requiring an account just to view reviews!

I surely don't want to sign in with my google account or amazon account or any other and have my viewing history tracked in that way. Not a chance, gosh no!

I've been trying some tricks I know that people use to get around paywalled stuff
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: FOIA Appeal Forces Release of Highly Classified NSA UAP Records
item.description: A newly released batch of NSA UAP records marked “TOP SECRET UMBRA” reveals decades of classified intelligence monitoring tied to unidentified aerial incidents. The post FOIA Appeal Forces Release of Highly Classified NSA UAP Records appeared first on WHITLEY STRIEBER'S UNKNOWN COUNTRY.
item.content:encoded: A newly released batch of NSA UAP records marked “TOP SECRET UMBRA” reveals decades of classified intelligence monitoring tied to unidentified aerial incidents. The post FOIA Appeal Forces Release of Highly Classified NSA UAP Records appeared first on WHITLEY STRIEBER'S UNKNOWN COUNTRY.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Calloway

item.title: Candid Color Systems face scan?
item.description: the company that did photos for my graduation wants me to scan my face so it can match it with the photos in the gallery from the event…i’m assuming this is some dystopian Persona shit?? i tried reading their privacy policy but it’s so convoluted and confusing of course. is this actually a private thing and they actually delete my photo after i take/upload it, or
item.content:encoded: the company that did photos for my graduation wants me to scan my face so it can match it with the photos in the gallery from the event…i’m assuming this is some dystopian Persona shit?? i tried reading their privacy policy but it’s so convoluted and confusing of course. is this actually a private thing and they actually delete my photo after i take/upload it, or
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb
